---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new for GhostPath
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this solves

What friction or gap does this address? Be specific — "I often have to..." is
more useful than "It would be nice if...".

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you have in mind. If it involves a new CLI command or a
`Ghostfile.json` field, sketch the interface:

```bash
ghostpath <proposed-command> [flags]
```

```json
{
  "newField": "example value"
}
```

## Alternatives you considered

Are there workarounds you currently use? Other tools that solve part of this?
Why does GhostPath need to own this rather than delegating to something else?

## Roadmap fit

Check the [Roadmap](../../README.md#roadmap) section of the README. Does this
fit into a planned milestone, or is it net-new scope? Which layer does it
belong to — Ghost, Navigator, DevKit, Dashboard, or Vault?

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or anything else that helps
explain the request.
